---
title: "Jesus' End Time Timeline" 
listing:
  contents: posts/series/**/*.qmd 
  date-format: dddd MMMM-DD-YYYY
  sort: "date asc"
  type: default
  categories: numbered
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false 
  fields: [date, title, reading-time, description, categories]
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false 
---

---
